title: Moose Jaw-Gravelbourg (Saskatchewan) - Canada.ca
content:
## Moose Jaw and Gravelbourg Saskatchewan

## Moose Jaw and Gravelbourg Saskatchewan
Because of its vibrant Francophone presence, Moose Jaw and Gravelbourg is encouraging French-speaking newcomers to settle there. There are Francophone and French immersion schools. French courses are also offered in the community.
